title: Quantitative Strategies at TD Asset Management
description:
We’re excited to welcome Julien Palardy, Managing Director and Head of Quantitative Investing at TD Asset Management.

With nearly 20 years of experience in quantitative equity and systematic investing, Julien will share insights into how quantitative strategies are developed and implemented inside one of Canada’s largest asset managers.

If you’re interested in quant research, systematic trading, or careers in quantitative finance, this is a talk you won’t want to miss.
